{# tabs/overview.html — Vendor overview tab with details, rating, blacklist toggle. Receives: vendor (ORM object), avg_rating (float or None), review_count (int). Called by: views.py vendor_tab endpoint (tab_name='overview'). Depends on: HTMX (blacklist toggle, rating submit), Alpine.js (star widget). #}
{{ vendor.website or '-' }}
{{ vendor.domain or '-' }}
{{ vendor.industry or '-' }}
{% if vendor.hq_city %}{{ vendor.hq_city }}{% endif %} {% if vendor.hq_state %}, {{ vendor.hq_state }}{% endif %} {% if vendor.hq_country %} {{ vendor.hq_country }}{% endif %} {% if not vendor.hq_city and not vendor.hq_state %}-{% endif %}
{{ vendor.employee_size or '-' }}
{{ vendor.sighting_count or 0 }}
{# Blacklist toggle #}

Blacklist

{# Rating section #}

Rating

{% if avg_rating is not none %} {{ avg_rating | round(1) }} ({{ review_count }} review{{ 's' if review_count != 1 }}) {% else %} No reviews yet {% endif %}
{% for i in range(1, 6) %} {% endfor %}
{# Enrichment info #} {% if vendor.last_enriched_at %}

Enrichment

Last enriched: {{ vendor.last_enriched_at.strftime('%b %d, %Y') }} via {{ vendor.enrichment_source or 'unknown' }}

{% endif %}
